reviews.comment:
Mas de 40 min de espera... Atienden con mucha amabilidad, pero una pasts encima... Que contagian sueño..

(Translated by Google)
Over 40 minutes wait... They're very friendly, but they take a pill... which makes you sleepy.

reviews.comment:
Es pésima la atención de los playeros y siempre hay fila, lo único bueno es que es YPF. Para lo demás malísima

(Translated by Google)
The service from the attendants is terrible and there's always a line; the only good thing is that it's a YPF station. Otherwise, it's awful.

reviews.comment:
Con los años que tiene esa estación tendría que estar muchoooo mejor.  El bufete cerrado.  Los playeros re macanudos. Fui a la ypf de la entrada.

(Translated by Google)
Given how old that station is, it should be in much better condition. The buffet was closed. The attendants were really nice. I went to the YPF gas station at the entrance.
